Answer: Positive integers → Numbers greater than zero
Negative integers → Numbers less than zero
Number line → Shows integers in order
Addition of two positive integers → Always gives a positive integer
Addition of two negative integers → Always gives a negative integer
Additive inverse → Opposite of a number

Answer: Subtracting a negative integer → Same as adding a positive integer
